# Card Spec Usage

## Summary
This spec defines a card with the code ref `(name:X, module:../x)`. It can be used to display a card with a title and other fields.

## Import
```gts
import { X } from '../x';
```

## Usage as a Field
To use the `X` card as a field within a consuming card or field, you can link to it using the `linksTo` field type:

```gts
@field myCardField = linksTo(X);
```

This will allow you to display the `X` card wherever the `myCardField` is used.

## Template Usage
To display the `X` card within a template, you can use the `@fields.myCardField` syntax:

```hbs
<@fields.myCardField @format="embedded" />
```

This will render the `X` card in its `embedded` format, which is suitable for inclusion within other cards.
